word: H6808 - צָעָה - tsâʻâh - tsaw-aw' - Captive exile

sections.paragraph:
Original: צעה

Transliteration: tsâ‛âh

Phonetic: tsaw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to stoop, bend, incline
    1. (Qal)
      1. to stoop, bend
      2. to incline, tip
    2. (Piel) to tip over

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1944

Part(s) of speech: Verb
